SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-17-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-17-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT GLORIA SPOON KAUFMAN IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT BILL QUAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT INFORMED THE COURT THAT THE TRUE OWNER OF THE PROPERTY IS LAI KING QUAN PERPERTIES, LLC, MR.BILL QUAN FILLS OUT A SC-109 AS AN AUTHORIZED AGENT, PROPERTY MANAGER. THE COURT AMENDS THE NAME ON THE CLAIM AND DISMISES THE CASE AGAINST BILL QUAN THE INDIVIDUAL. THE COURT VERBALLY ORDERS THE DEFENDANT IN THE CASE TO STOP GIVING OUT REFERENCES ON THE PLAINTIFF. A CHECK IN THE AMOUNT OF $724.65 WAS TAKEN FROM THE PLAINTIFF AND GIVEN TO DEFENDANT IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
